steps.name: Animation controls (Layout-Engine-approved presets only)
steps.last_error: transient: git push SSH port 22 timed out 2x, succeeded on 3rd retry

steps.name: Wire up tests + verify all AC + real browser

decisions.decision: feat/5-2-edit-controls existed locally but was fully merged into main (no unique commits) -- reset it to latest main tip before starting, rather than building on stale history.
decisions.why: reversible/locally-scoped per autonomy-policy.md; branch had zero diff vs main so resetting loses nothing.

decisions.decision: npm install was accidentally run once in the shared main checkout (F:/vnpt/auto-video-research/frontend) instead of this worktree before being corrected; no source files were changed there, only node_modules/lockfile churn in a directory this task does not own.
decisions.why: transparency per autonomy-policy decision-logging; corrected immediately, no functional impact.

decisions.decision: Frontend test convention: followed 5-1's actual co-located __tests__/ pattern (frontend/src/components/workspace/controls/__tests__/*.test.tsx) instead of the task file's frontend/tests/unit/components/controls/... path, since CLAUDE.md memory already flags the frontend test-directory convention as undocumented/unresolved and 5-1 established co-location as the real precedent.
decisions.why: locally-scoped, reversible; matches existing working code over an inferred, never-verified path.

decisions.decision: Created frontend/src/lib/scene/constants.ts and layout-constraints.ts as small shared modules mirroring backend/app/schemas/scene.py's Literal enums and docs/specs/scene-json-schema.md S2's per-layout element-count table -- needed by multiple controls (Text/Animation/LayoutDryRun), not duplicated per-component.
decisions.why: avoids inventing values ad hoc in each control; single source mirrored from the real contract, per rules/type-safety.md.

decisions.decision: Added wcag-contrast (npm) as the contrast-check library for Step 2's ColorPicker, per the task's explicit instruction not to hand-roll WCAG math.
decisions.why: small, dependency-free, MIT-licensed; registry reachable, installed cleanly in the worktree.

decisions.decision: No packages/remotion-templates/src/motion/presets.ts data file exists (only Animated.tsx with two hardcoded preset strings). Used backend/app/schemas/scene.py's Animation.type Literal (mirrored in lib/scene/constants.ts) as the authoritative allowed-values source instead, since that IS the render contract's actual enum.
decisions.why: contract-matching, not a new invented enum; scene.py is the one Scene JSON source of truth per rules/type-safety.md.

decisions.decision: Verified empirically that happy-dom does not natively step <input type=range> on ArrowLeft/ArrowRight keydown (a throwaway probe test showed .value unchanged). Added explicit onKeyDown handling with preventDefault() so the control has one deterministic, cross-environment code path for AC-5, rather than relying on unobservable native browser behavior.
decisions.why: makes AC-5 both correct in real browsers and actually testable in this project's test environment; reversible/locally-scoped.

decisions.decision: git push to origin timed out twice (SSH port 22) before succeeding on the 3rd attempt/after a git ls-remote probe -- treated as a transient network blip per the retry policy, not a step failure.
decisions.why: ls-remote succeeded moments later confirming connectivity recovered; no code/config change was needed.
